_comment: Framer QA Agent Configuration — fill in your details below

figma._comment_token: Get your token at figma.com → Account Settings → Personal Access Tokens
figma._comment_file_id: Found in the Figma file URL: figma.com/design/FILE_ID/...
figma._comment_frames: Map each URL path to a Figma node ID. To find a node ID: click a frame in Figma → right-click → Copy link → the node-id in the URL (replace - with :). Example: node-id=123-456 becomes '123:456'

_comment_output: Folder where reports will be saved (created automatically)
_comment_diff_threshold: Pixel diff sensitivity 0–255. Lower = stricter. 10 is recommended.
